seo.title: PII Filtering for AI Agents in Google ADK Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix pii filtering for ai agents in Google ADK agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Google ADK, PII Filtering for AI Agents fails when multi-agent workflows delegate sensitive data across Gemini-powered agents without consistent redaction, leading to unfiltered PII propagation. Session state corruption in long conversations exacerbates this by retaining leaked PII across agent handoffs. Tool response mismatches further expose PII when agents parse unredacted outputs from external APIs.

howItManifests.symptom: Agent B receives unredacted customer data from Agent A via shared session state
howItManifests.impact: PII spreads across agent boundaries, violating compliance

howItManifests.symptom: Newer Gemini model outputs raw PII while previous model had filtering enabled

howItManifests.scenario: Tool responses containing PII passed to downstream agents
howItManifests.symptom: External API returns email addresses that agents forward without redaction
howItManifests.impact: Third-party PII enters agent memory unfiltered

howItManifests.symptom: Historical PII from early turns persists in session context for all agents
howItManifests.impact: Cumulative PII exposure across entire workflow

detection.name: PII Regex Scanner for Agent Inputs
detection.description: Scans agent inputs for common PII patterns before processing
detection.code:
import re

def scan_pii_agent_input(input_text: str) -> list[str]:
    patterns = [
        r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b',
        r'\b\d{3}-?\d{2}-?\d{4}\b',
        r'\b\d{16}\b',
        r'\b[A-Z]\d[A-Z]\s?\d[A-Z]\d{3}\b'
    ]
    findings = []
    for pattern in patterns:
        matches = re.findall(pattern, input_text)
        if matches:
            findings.extend(matches)
    return findings

# Usage in ADK
result = scan_pii_agent_input('Contact john.doe@email.com or 555-123-4567')

fixes.name: Vex PII Filter Callback
fixes.description: Pre-agent callback that redacts PII before ADK agent execution
fixes.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
vex = Vex(api_key='your-vex-key')

def pii_filter_callback(agent_input):
    # Vex PII redaction
    cleaned_input = vex.redact_pii(agent_input, categories=['EMAIL', 'PHONE', 'SSN'])
    return {'status': 'filtered', 'clean_input': cleaned_input}

from google.adk import Agent
agent = Agent(
    name='pii_protected_agent',
    before_agent_callback=pii_filter_callback
)

fixes.name: Session State Sanitizer
fixes.description: Cleans PII from ADK session state on each agent turn
fixes.code:
import re
from google.adk import Session

def sanitize_session_state(session: Session):
    state_str = str(session.state)
    # Redact PII
    cleaned_state = re.sub(r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b', '[EMAIL_REDACTED]', state_str)
    cleaned_state = re.sub(r'\b\d{3}-?\d{2}-?\d{4}\b', '[SSN_REDACTED]', cleaned_state)
    session.state = cleaned_state

# Call before each agent invocation
sanitize_session_state(current_session)

fixes.name: Tool Response PII Blocker
fixes.description: Blocks tool responses containing PII from reaching downstream agents

vexAutomation.heading: Automating PII Filtering for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly as a before_agent_callback in Google ADK, automatically scanning all agent inputs, session states, and tool responses for PII before execution. It uses enterprise-grade NER models trained on 50+ PII categories, providing 99.2% recall with zero false negatives on compliance datasets. Vex not only detects but auto-redacts PII in real-time, maintaining agent functionality while ensuring GDPR/CCPA compliance.

For multi-agent workflows, Vex creates audit trails across agent boundaries and enforces consistent PII policies regardless of Gemini model versions. The platform generates compliance reports and blocks problematic workflows before PII exposure occurs. Integration takes <5 minutes with the vex-sdk pip package.

Vex's ADK-specific integration handles session state corruption automatically by sanitizing state on every agent handoff, eliminating the common failure mode of PII accumulation in long conversations.
vexAutomation.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
from google.adk import Agent, Workflow

# Install: pip install google-adk vex-sdk
vex = Vex(api_key='vex-your-key-here')

def vex_pii_guardian(inputs):
    '''Vex before_agent_callback for ADK'''
    results = vex.scan({
        'agent_input': inputs['message'],
        'session_state': str(inputs.get('session', '')),
        'tool_context': inputs.get('tools', [])
    })
    
    if results.pii_detected:
        # Auto-redact
        cleaned = vex.redact(results)
        return {
            'status': 'pii_filtered',
            'redactions': results.counts,
            'clean_input': cleaned['agent_input'],
            'compliance_score': results.score
        }
    return {'status': 'clean', 'input': inputs['message']}

# Apply to ADK agents
customer_agent = Agent(
    name='customer_service',
    model='gemini-2.0-flash',
    before_agent_callback=vex_pii_guardian
)

workflow = Workflow(agents=[customer_agent])

# Vex auto-generates compliance report
vex.enable_monitoring(workflow=workflow, policy='strict-pii')
